headline: Did Akamai’s US$200 Million Blackwell GPU Cloud Deal Just Shift Akamai Technologies' (AKAM) Investment Narrative?
summary: In early March 2026, Akamai Technologies detailed a four-year, US$200,000,000 service agreement to provide a multi-thousand NVIDIA Blackwell GPU cluster and related cloud infrastructure to a major U.S. AI-focused tech company, while also urging shareholders in a preliminary proxy to vote against a proposal for expanded political spending disclosures. The AI compute deal, which relies on Akamai’s recently expanded distributed cloud footprint and large Blackwell GPU acquisition, underscores...
